items.requirement: Metric claims in text must match evaluation tables/data
Must include confidence intervals or statistical significance measures
Must report dataset sizes for all evaluation sets
All claimed capabilities must have corresponding evaluation metrics
Bias analysis must provide specific methodology, not vague claims
Must include quantitative results from bias evaluation
Must specify which demographic groups or categories were tested
Training data description must be consistent with model architecture claims
Must document data representativeness and known limitations
Model architecture description must be internally consistent across all sections
Must specify model size (parameters) or complexity
Limitations must be specific and actionable, not generic disclaimers
Must include specific compute costs (GPU hours, hardware type)
Must report or estimate carbon footprint
